Reading tool

I Ching Coin Reading Tool

Ask one clear question, cast six lines, and read the result as a reflective I Ching pattern.

Ready to cast

Enter a question to generate a primary hexagram, changing lines, and a relating pattern.

  • Use one specific situation.
  • Read the result as reflection.
  • Do not use it as professional advice.
Deep reading

Upgrade this cast into a complete I Ching report

Turn the free hexagram result into a clearer personal reading with plain-language meaning, changing-line guidance, relating-hexagram trend, decision notes, and a 7-day action plan.

Free tool includescoin castprimary hexagramchanging lines
  • Plain answer summary
  • Main hexagram meaning
  • Changing-line interpretation
  • Relating hexagram trend
  • Love, work, and money notes
  • Practical next steps
